body:
## Rationale

Jaska Raatikainen is a **top-signal entity** this week: 7 GA4 page views, 6 users on /drummer/jaska-raatikainen, 2 GSC clicks at 40% CTR on "jaska raatikainen drum set". Three Children of Bodom albums fill the arc gaps between existing DB entries.

**Current DB coverage:**
- \`hatebreeder-drum-setup\` ✅ (CoB 1999)
- \`hate-crew-deathroll-drum-setup\` ✅ (CoB 2003)

**Proposed gaps:**
- \`follow-the-reaper-drum-setup\` — CoB 2000, Jaska's most technical album, fills hatebreeder→hate-crew-deathroll gap
- \`are-you-dead-yet-drum-setup\` — CoB 2005, most commercially successful CoB (#56 Finland), fills hate-crew→blooddrunk gap
- \`blooddrunk-drum-setup\` — CoB 2008, Jaska's final CoB album before leaving (2015), closes Jaska/CoB arc

**LLM anchor:** "What equipment did Jaska Raatikainen use on Follow the Reaper?" — zero competitor coverage.

## Template / data shape

```js
// Follow the Reaper (2000)
{
  slug: 'follow-the-reaper-drum-setup',
  title: "Children of Bodom's Follow the Reaper Drum Setup",
  drummer: 'jaska-raatikainen',
  band: 'Children of Bodom',
  album: 'Follow the Reaper',
  year: 2000,
  description: "Jaska Raatikainen's kit on CoB's second album...",
  gear: { drumKit: 'Pearl Masters Custom', cymbals: 'Zildjian A Custom', ... },
  relatedAlbums: ['hatebreeder-drum-setup', 'hate-crew-deathroll-drum-setup']
}
// Are You Dead Yet? (2005) — same shape
// Blooddrunk (2008) — same shape
```

## Files to touch
- `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` — add 3 entries
- `public/llms/articles/follow-the-reaper-drum-setup.md`
- `public/llms/articles/are-you-dead-yet-drum-setup.md`
- `public/llms/articles/blooddrunk-drum-setup.md`

## Quality gate
- ≥300 words per article
- Gear section: drum kit, cymbals, heads, hardware (specific models where known)
- ≥3 internal links per article (hatebreeder page, hate-crew page, Jaska profile)
- FAQ ≥3 Q&A per article
- `Article` schema + `Person` schema (Jaska) + `MusicAlbum` schema
- LLM file: plain markdown, ≥200 words, gear list + historical context

## Estimated organic uplift
Targets "jaska raatikainen [album] drum setup" query cluster — currently zero coverage. 40% GSC CTR confirms Jaska intent is high-quality. Est. +15–20 impressions/week across 3 pages once indexed.

## Verify
- [ ] All 3 slugs absent from `albumArticles.js`
- [ ] Each article ≥300 words with gear section
- [ ] Each LLM file published at `/llms/articles/<slug>.md`
- [ ] Sitemap includes all 3 new pages
- [ ] `relatedAlbums` chains form a coherent arc: hatebreeder ↔ follow-the-reaper ↔ hate-crew-deathroll ↔ are-you-dead-yet ↔ blooddrunk

## Done
When all 3 articles are live, all 3 LLM files exist, and sitemap is updated.
title: SEO batch: Children of Bodom album trio — Follow the Reaper + Are You Dead Yet? + Blooddrunk (Jaska Raatikainen, 2000/2005/2008 — ~3 articles + 3 LLM files)
